nl_query: Show all scanner devices registered at the Main Campus that are active and have scanned at least one script.
failed_sql: SELECT sd.id, sd.device_id, sd.device_name, sd.registered_at, sd.last_seen_at FROM scanner_device sd JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = sd.campus_id WHERE au.unit_type = 'COURSE' AND au.code = 'MAIN' AND sd.is_active = TRUE AND sd.id IN (SELECT device_id FROM scan_history WHERE is_active = TRUE)
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): scan_history.is_active. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
